description:
In `packages/core/src/handlers/health.ts` at lines ~240 and ~249, `getHealthTrend` and `getHealthDiff` throw plain `Error` objects when component history is missing. These get wrapped as `[UNKNOWN]` by the error handler instead of the correct `[NOT_FOUND]` category.

**Fix:** Replace bare `throw new Error(...)` with `throw new MCPError(ErrorCategory.NOT_FOUND, ...)` at both locations.

**Acceptance criteria:**
- `getHealthTrend` throws `MCPError(NOT_FOUND)` when no history file exists for a component
- `getHealthDiff` throws `MCPError(NOT_FOUND)` when no history file exists for a component  
- Tests verify the error category is `NOT_FOUND` not `UNKNOWN`
- All existing tests continue to pass
title: fix: use NOT_FOUND error category for missing component history
